basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Surat Teaching Assistants Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT Surat) Teaching Assistants Notification 2026 has been released on 24 April 2026 on the official website www.svnit.ac.in. Have been announced through the SVNIT Surat Teaching Assistants Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Teaching Assistants: 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M. Tech. / M.E. and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in B. Tech. / B.E with Good Academic Record. Teaching Assistants: Ph. D. (in appropriate branch) with 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in B. Tech. / B.E. and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M. Tech. / M.E. with Good Academic Record.

selection_process: Registration Document Verification Written Test and/or Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Teaching Assistants. This is an ad-hoc position at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly without prior online application.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15th May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for Teaching Assistants?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a 1st Class or equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5) in M.Tech./M.E. and B.Tech./B.E., or a Ph.D. in the appropriate branch with similar academic records.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Teaching Assistants?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Teaching Assistants position ranges from Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Registration, Document Verification, and a Written Test and/or Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).
